Hero.badge: In Istanbul since 2000 — 25+ years of experience
Hero.subtitle: Interior & exterior painting, façade work, roofing and turnkey full renovation. A quarter-century of experience, clean workmanship and a free site survey guaranteed.
Hero.serviceArea: Service area: Istanbul and surrounding provinces (incl. Kocaeli, Yalova)

Services.title: End-to-end renovation solutions
Services.subtitle: One team at your side at every stage — from planning to delivery and clean-up.
Services.customTitle: Don't see the service you need?
Services.customText: Tell us about your project and we'll offer a tailored solution and a free quote.

Gallery.title: Before & After
Gallery.subtitle: Drag the divider to see the transformation yourself.

Process.title: Renovation in 4 Steps
Process.subtitle: Transparent, planned and on time. You know what's happening from start to finish.

steps.title: Free Survey & Quote
steps.text: We come to your address, take measurements, listen to your needs and provide a clear quote.

steps.title: Planning & Materials
steps.text: We set the schedule and material choices together and clarify every stage.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Our experienced team delivers the work on time, cleanly and with great care.

steps.title: Handover & Clean-up
steps.text: We hand the space over spotless and stay in touch until you're satisfied.
